visual_description: A young child with shaggy hair, wearing a red sweater with gray stripes over a plaid shirt, stands facing a white door. The child holds a knife in the right hand and a red marker in the left, writing the word RECURSION on the door. In the dimly lit room, a person lies on a bed covered with a patterned blanket and a blue blanket, while a lamp on a nightstand casts warm light.
